title.en: TRANSMISSION SYSTEMS FOR MEASURED VALUES, CONTROL OR SIMILAR SIGNALS (fluid pressure transmitting systems F15B; mechanical means for transferring the output of a sensing member into a different variable G01D5/00; mechanical control systems G05G)
Arrangements for influencing the relationship between signals at input and output, e.g. differentiating, delaying
to yield a signal which is a function of two or more signals, e.g. sum or product
Arrangements characterised by the use of multiplexing for the transmission of a plurality of signals over a common path
simultaneously, i.e. using frequency division
successively, i.e. using time division
Arrangements for transmitting signals characterised by the use of a wireless electrical link
using a radio link
using magnetically coupled devices
using capacity coupling
Electric signal transmission systems (G08C17/00 takes precedence)
in which the signal transmitted is magnitude of current or voltage (G08C19/36, G08C19/38 take precedence)
in which the signal transmitted is frequency or phase of AC
in which transmission is by pulses
in which transmission is by selection of one or more conductors or channels from a plurality of conductors or channels (G08C19/38 takes precedence)
using optical means to covert the input signal {(characterised by optical transfer means G01D5/26; optical analogue digital converters G02F7/00)}
using dynamo-electric devices (operated by pulses G08C19/20)
Systems for transmitting the position of an object with respect to a predetermined reference system, e.g. tele-autographic system
Non-electrical signal transmission systems, e.g. optical systems
using infrasonic, sonic or ultrasonic waves
using light waves, e.g. infrared
through light guides, e.g. optical fibres
Arrangements for preventing or correcting errors; Monitoring arrangements
by signalling back receiving station to transmitting station
by recording transmitted signals
Transmission systems for measured values, control or similar signals
Transmission systems of control signals via wireless link
Power supply of remote control devices
Binding and programming of remote control devices
User interface
Remote control systems using repeaters, converters, gateways
Receiving or transmitting feedback, e.g. replies, status updates, acknowledgements, from the controlled devices
Security, fault tolerance
Device selection
Additional features
